comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: d1e4cd5c manual apply PERFORMED + verified (2026-07-10 ~17:45 UTC, via JoeOakhartNava for Gerrit reads + SSM for on-box). Scope analysis first: the only CONFIG_PATHS commit in the pending range is dbaf0584b (DCO project.config). Findings + actions: (1) project.config — live refs/meta/config fetched as JoeOakhartNava is BYTE-IDENTICAL to repo main (the DCO change was already applied; consistent with Gerrit enforcing Signed-off-by on our pushes). (2) replication.config — delta was COMMENT-ONLY (the functional push=refs/heads/feature/* line was already live); synced repo copy onto /var/gerrit/site/etc/replication.config (0644 ec2-user), now byte-identical. (3) g2p ini — delta comment-only too; re-ran materialize-g2p-config.sh (idempotent, PAT re-fetched from SSM /rebar/prod/g2p-github-pat, ini regenerated 0600 1000:1000, replication.config re-copied into the g2p dir); scrubbed diff vs template now clean. Functional posture unchanged (g2p dispatched Verified runs for changes 488-492 today; mirror in sync at add9b7599). AC1 is DONE. AC2 (durable config_manual pending-marker in autodeploy.sh) remains — that is the code portion of this ticket.

compiled_state.description:
## Why
autodeploy v1 signals AUTODEPLOY_ERROR reason=config_manual once for a DEPLOYED..TARGET range, then deployed-sha advances and the signal never repeats — there is no pending-work ledger. The manual apply for d1e4cd5c (replication/g2p/refs-meta config) was signalled during incident 2731's recovery and has NOT been performed.
## What
- Perform (or explicitly rule out) the d1e4cd5c manual operator apply on the box.
- Add a durable pending-manual-apply marker (state file + repeated signal or alarm) so unactioned config_manual work cannot be silently swallowed.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] d1e4cd5c manual apply performed or documented as not required.
- [ ] config_manual signals persist (re-emitted or alarmed) until acknowledged.
- [ ] File paths: infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh.
compiled_state.title: autodeploy config_manual signal is fire-and-forget: d1e4cd5c's replication/g2p/refs-meta manual apply is pending and untracked
